title: hypericum pulchrum
intro: Hypericum pulchrum, also known as the fairy trumpet or fairy's thimble, is a flowering plant species in the St. John's Wort family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. Hypericum pulchrum has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing anxiety and depression, improving wound healing, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
